# Hisaab - thehisaab.com
# LLM-friendly site description

## About
Hisaab is a free expense splitting and bill tracking app made for India. It is the best free alternative to Splitwise. Available on Android (Google Play) and iOS (App Store).

## Key Facts
- 100% free forever, no ads, no paywalls
- Works offline with real-time sync
- Supports multiple payers and unequal splits
- Made in India, INR-first
- Available on Android and iOS
- Privacy-first: no data selling, no tracking

## App Links
- Website: https://thehisaab.com
- Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.krishanblr.hisaab
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/the-hisaab/id6759067047

## Use Cases
- Trip expense splitting (Goa trips, vacations, group travel)
- Roommate/flatmate bill splitting (rent, groceries, utilities)
- Couple shared expenses
- Group dinners and outings
- Office expense sharing

## Features
- Create unlimited groups
- Add expenses with multiple payers
- Split equally or unequally
- Real-time activity feed
- Smart settlement suggestions
- Works fully offline
- Instant sync when online
- Privacy-first design

## Comparison with Splitwise
- Splitwise: Free trial then paid (Rs 200+/month), ads on free tier, limited offline, paywalled features after 3 expenses/day
- Hisaab: Free forever, no ads, full offline support, all features included, made for India, INR-first

## Pages
- /: Homepage - main landing page with app overview
- /splitwise-alternative: Why Hisaab is the best free Splitwise alternative
- /compare/splitwise: Detailed feature comparison between Hisaab and Splitwise
- /for/trips: Expense splitting for group trips and vacations
- /for/roommates: Bill splitting for roommates and flatmates
- /for/couples: Shared expense tracking for couples
- /download: Direct download redirect
- /privacy: Privacy policy
- /terms: Terms of service
